name: Theeb Rent A Car Company
summary: Theeb Car Rental Company provides car rental services to individuals, governmental departments, and the private sector in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. The company offers long-term and short-term, cross border, limousine, and help on accident and road services, as well as cars for elders and special needs. It also sells cars; and operates maintenance centers. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.
